title: oenothera syrticola var. litorea
intro: Oenothera syrticola var. litorea, also known as Sea Evening Primrose, is a perennial plant species within the Evening Primrose family, native to the coastal regions of Eastern Europe and Western Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects due to its rich content of essential fatty acids and flavonoids. The health benefits of Sea Evening Primrose include relief from skin irritations, improved heart health, and potential anti-cancer properties, making it a valuable addition to herbal medicine. Herbal preparations of Oenothera syrticola var. litorea include infusions, tinctures, and capsules, which can be used to support overall well-being and promote a healthy lifestyle.
